text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>... You
truly are as great as they come. I can't help but
stand in awe.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text: I understand your frustration, Meek. I really do.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
But Trainer <username>, you
and your trainee... You've both really inspired us!

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: I'll shine just as bright someday. You'll see.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
Trainer <username>, my role
model and my rival...

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
We learned so much from them, didn't we, Meek?
Trainer <username> really is
something else.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Yeah, and my rival racer was just as cool.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
True, but don't forget how incredible you were
out there. Watching how your running has
improved... I've really come to believe that the
sky's the limit.

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I've cooked up some new strategies for us, so I'll
be sure to run them by Trainer
<username> later to refine
them.

text_block_list.name: Happy Meek
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Trainer. I'll try even harder. Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Trainer Kiryuin
text_block_list.text:
I should be thanking you, Meek. Let's keep
aiming for even greater heights together!
